recommendations.title: Issue ₹50 Cr Green Bond by 2026-07-31
recommendations.description: Leverage the high ESG rating of 86.8/100 to issue a ₹50 Cr green bond, attracting incremental ₹40-60 Cr green financing and reducing cost of capital by 20-40 bps per BRSR guidance.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹40-60 Cr incremental green financing and 20-40 bps cost of capital reduction
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power ₹5000 Cr green bond issuance

audit_trail.value: High ESG rating enables green bond issuance with cost of capital benefit
₹5000 Cr green bond issuance led to P/E rerating

recommendations.title: Conduct ESG-Focused Investor Roadshow by 2026-06-30
recommendations.description: Organize an investor roadshow highlighting the inaugural ESG rating of 86.8/100 to capture valuation uplift of ₹96.2 Cr and attract ESG-focused funds.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹96.2 Cr valuation upside from improved investor perception

audit_trail.value: ESG rating momentum can be leveraged for investor communication

recommendations.title: Publish ESG Case Study with CARE Ratings by 2026-08-31
recommendations.description: Co-publish a detailed ESG case study with CARE ESG Ratings Limited to amplify brand positioning and attract premium pricing from ESG-conscious customers.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹10-15 Cr revenue uplift from premium ESG positioning

audit_trail.value: High ESG rating supports co-marketing opportunities

recommendations.title: Advance CDP Submission to Pursue A-List by 2026-12-31
recommendations.description: Accelerate CDP disclosure efforts to achieve A-list status, unlocking premium valuation and aligning with investor expectations on climate transparency.

audit_trail.value: CDP score tracked by investors; A-list inclusion = premium valuation
